data.revised_prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: desktop web app dashboard concept
Primary request: Create a premium desktop web application dashboard for an AI learning companion platform called "StudyPet".

Design style:
Apple Human Interface Design, Notion calm spacing, Arc Browser softness, Duolingo emotional engagement, modern premium SaaS dashboard.
Avoid educational platform style, enterprise dashboard style, gaming UI, childish design, clutter.

Canvas:
16:9 desktop web app, 1440px layout, light mode.

Color system:
Primary #6366F1, secondary #A5B4FC, background #F8FAFC, glassmorphism white cards, soft shadows, subtle gradients, large whitespace.

Layout:
Top navigation bar.
Center hero area.
Bottom functional area with three premium cards.

Top bar:
Left StudyPet logo.
Center greeting text:
"Good Afternoon, Xiaoming"
"Today is another day of growth."
Right side notification bell, user avatar, pet level, EXP progress bar.

Main hero:
Large AI pet character in the center taking 60-70% visual attention.
The pet is an original cute premium AI companion, not a realistic animal, not anime fan art, not childish.
It sits on a floating platform with soft gradient background, floating particles, ambient lighting, subtle breathing energy.
The pet should feel alive, warm, intelligent, and emotionally supportive.

Left of pet:
Glass speech bubble:
"You have studied for 12 consecutive days. Keep going. I believe in you."
Below it: Pet information card with Level, EXP, Growth Status, Unlock Progress.

Right of pet:
Glass AI chat panel with rounded corners.
Conversation prompts:
"How was your study today?"
"What made you proud today?"
"What challenge did you encounter?"
Input placeholder:
"Talk with StudyPet..."

Bottom section:
Three premium glass cards.

Card 1:
Today's Study Plan
Checklist:
Mathematics Review 30 min
English Reading 20 min
Physics Practice 40 min
Progress bar, completion percentage, button "Generate New AI Plan".

Card 2:
Today's Learning Overview
Study Duration, Tasks Completed, Current Streak, Weekly Trend, button "Complete Today's Check-in".

Card 3:
Study Calendar
GitHub-style purple heatmap monthly calendar, current streak highlight.

Micro interactions visual cues:
floating numbers +50 EXP, +10 Motivation, +1 Streak.
soft hover-like elevation.
particle celebration.

Typography:
Modern clean Apple-like sans serif, high readability, no decorative fonts.

Mood:
calm, warm, intelligent, minimal, premium, emotionally engaging.
The page should immediately communicate: this is not an education tool, this is my AI study companion helping me grow every day.

No watermark, no browser chrome, no code, no unrelated text.
